item.title: systems-genomics-lab/deeptaxa
item.description: A deep learning framework (CNN-BERT) for hierarchical taxonomic classification of 16S rRNA gene sequences, available as a command-line tool and a QIIME 2 plugin.

item.title: avikds/Kaggle-Notebooks-Avik
item.description: A collection of my Kaggle notebooks, featuring end-to-end dataset analyses, competition solutions, and course projects across Data Science, Machine Learning, and AI.

item.title: CarinaFo/tms_brainpattern
item.description: WIP: TMS on dynamic brain patterns

item.title: dev-sudeep018/fluorite-architecture
item.description: Empirical research toward persistent digital identity — 17 experiments, EqProp-reservoir synthesis, behavioral momentum. Toward Vivy: Fluorite Eye's Song.

item.title: max-talanov/1
item.description: personal repository

item.title: beacon-biosignals/PyMNE.jl
item.description: Julia interface to MNE-Python via PythonCall

item.title: SLAM-Lab/SANA-FE
item.description: Simulation of Advanced Neuromorphic Architectures for Fast Exploration

item.title: JuliaHealth/Thunderbolt.jl
item.description: A modular shared-memory high-performance framework for multiscale cardiac multiphysics simulations.

item.title: rtrelease/Jetson-Symbolics-Neuromorphics
item.description: Integrating Symbolic Programming and Neuromorphic Modeling for Edge Labs with NVIDIA Jetson, DGX Spark, and GPU-based DNN/ML Systems

item.title: calderast/jdb_to_nwb
item.description: Converts electrophysiology, photometry, and behavioral data for the hex maze task used by the Berke Lab at UCSF to NWB format.

item.title: neuroTUM/Cortical-Peaks-Challenge-2026
item.description: A collection of arcade games built with Python and Pygame, designed and implemented to serve as the competition environment for the Cortical Peaks Challenge at the Graz BCI Conference 2026

item.description: NeuroRVQ: Multi-Scale Biosignal Tokenization for Generative Foundation Models

item.title: delvendahl/miniML
item.description: A deep learning framework for synaptic event detection

item.title: thiswillbeyourgithub/neurarium
item.description: Browser-based interactive 3D brain visualizer with regions, projections, circuits, psychiatric drugs, receptors, more to come.

item.title: CerebusOSS/CereLink
item.description: Blackrock Neurotech Cerebus Link for Neural Signal Processors

item.title: gbook/nidb
item.description: NeuroInformatics Database

item.title: eugenehp/brain2qwerty-rs
item.description: Brain2Qwerty V1/V2 MEG neural decoding inference in Rust (parity-tested vs Python)

item.title: jeshraghian/snntorch
item.description: Deep and online learning with spiking neural networks in Python

item.title: emer/axon
item.description: Axon is a spiking, biologically-based neural model driven by predictive error-driven learning, for systems-level models of the brain

item.title: openbraininstitute/BluePyOpt
item.description: Blue Brain Python Optimisation Library

item.description: A Julia integrative package for EEG data analysis and machine learning

item.title: pyRiemann/pyRiemann
item.description: Machine learning for multivariate data through the Riemannian geometry of positive definite matrices in Python

item.description: NeuroSkill™ — State of Mind Brain-Computer Interface system
